security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.youtube.com https://s.ytimg.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.youtube.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';

bundle.shortDescription: Organize and practice with YouTube videos
bundle.longDescription: A desktop application for organizing YouTube videos with precise loop controls and speed adjustment for practice and study.
